overview: This Modern blue deck revolves around assembling Goblin Charbelcher and a damage source to trigger its ability for lethal damage. Sea Gate Restoration provides the card advantage needed to find combo pieces quickly, while Disrupting Shoal offers early disruption or additional damage to enable the trigger. The deck aims to close games rapidly before opponents can stabilize or interact.
win_conditions: Trigger Goblin Charbelcher's ability by dealing damage to yourself to deal lethal damage to the opponent
Use Sea Gate Restoration to draw into combo pieces and finish the game
Leverage Disrupting Shoal for disruption or additional damage to enable the Charbelcher trigger

keep_criteria: Hands with Goblin Charbelcher and a damage source
Hands with multiple Sea Gate Restoration copies for card advantage
Hands with early Disrupting Shoal to disrupt opponent's game plan

Keep hands with 1-2 lands, 2+ draw/cantrip spells (Brainstorm, Ponder, Seething Song, Fire/Ignite), and at least one combo piece or way to find it (Sea Gate Restoration, Disrupting Shoal, or direct damage).
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking Goblin Charbelcher or damage sources
Hands with only high-cost cards or no cantrips
Hands with multiple lands and no combo pieces
Mulligan hands with 3+ lands, no draw spells, or only one land and no cantrips.

early_game: Play lands and Sea Gate Restoration to draw cards
Cast Goblin Charbelcher as soon as possible
Use Disrupting Shoal to remove early threats or set up damage
Turn 1: Play land, cast a cantrip or draw spell.
Turn 2: Play land, cast another draw spell, sequence to find combo pieces.
Prioritize finding Goblin Piledriver, Seething Song, Fire/Ignite, or Restoration.
Never attack with creatures unless you are at lethal or need to stabilize.
mid_game: Continue drawing with Restoration to find damage sources
Look for ways to deal damage to yourself to trigger the ability
always keep 2 mana open for Shoal and Restoration until you are ready to combo.
Do not overdraw if you have enough pieces, and use Restoration to fetch from the graveyard when needed.
Belcher wins by combo, not combat.
Hold back to protect your combo pieces and maintain mana flexibility for protection spells.
late_game: Execute the combo for lethal damage
Use remaining disruption to stall if combo fails
Rely on card advantage to outvalue opponents
Untapped Goblin Charbelcher plus 2 mana (or equivalent damage sources).
Ensure Charbelcher is untapped and you have exactly the right damage to hit 20.
Go all-in when you have the combo pieces, can protect them via Shoal or discard, and are ahead in life or can successfully race.

key_cards.name: Goblin Charbelcher
key_cards.notes: Cast early and trigger its ability by dealing damage to yourself to deal lethal damage to the opponent.

key_cards.name: Sea Gate Restoration
key_cards.notes: Cast repeatedly to draw into combo pieces, damage sources, and disruption while maintaining tempo.

key_cards.name: Disrupting Shoal
key_cards.notes: Use to remove early threats or deal damage to yourself to enable Charbelcher triggers, depending on the board state.

sequencing_tips: Always cast Sea Gate Restoration before committing to a Charbelcher trigger to ensure you have backup plans.
Hold Disrupting Shoal for opponent's key threats rather than using it prematurely for self-damage.
Prioritize playing Goblin Charbelcher on turn one or two to maximize its uptime and pressure.
Common mistakes include forgetting to check Charbelcher's untapped status, miscalculating damage, or overcommitting to the board.
Always track the opponent's life total.
Shoal can be cast at instant speed to protect your combo or counter threats.
Restoration can target your own graveyard.
Do not attack with creatures unless absolutely necessary.

matchups.advice: Prioritize early disruption and draw into damage sources quickly to combo off before they stabilize.
Use Sea Gate Restoration to draw around counterspells and find ways to bypass interaction.
Apply early pressure with Charbelcher and use Disrupting Shoal to disrupt their value loops.
Use Disrupting Shoal to counter counterspells. Use Thoughtseize to remove them early. Chain cantrips to find answers and pressure through disruption.
Race them aggressively. Use Shoal to protect your combo. Discard their ramp spells and use damage spells to stabilize your life total.
Race to combo first. Use Shoal to protect your combo and counter theirs. Use Thoughtseize to disrupt their hand and win the disruption race.

common_threats: Watch for counterspells (Force of Will, Counterspell), graveyard hate (Rest in Peace, Leyline of the Void), and spot removal.
Track the opponent's life total carefully for Charbelcher's damage calculation.
